package.name: drone_swarm_mavlink_pose_extractor
package.description: Extracts drone pose from raw MAVLink frames and publishes /drone_N/pose/estimated as geometry_msgs/PoseStamped (ENU frame) plus TF map → drone_N/base_link. Subscribes to /drone_N/mavlink/from_fc (std_msgs/UInt8MultiArray) and parses LOCAL_POSITION_NED (msgid=32) and ATTITUDE (msgid=30).
